title: Wedding Editorial Redesign Finalization
description: Finalize the wedding demo as an editorial hacienda experience with a distinct visual system, professional photography, and section-level redesign while preserving the existing public route contract.

phases.title: Platform Contract Stabilization
phases.description: Keep /boda/demo-bodas and /cumple/demo-cumple aligned to the current content and RSVP contracts.

phases.title: Editorial Asset Procurement & Registry Expansion
phases.description: Add wedding editorial photography for hero, family, ceremony, reception, gallery, and thank-you while keeping landing-page asset mappings correct.

phases.title: Wedding Editorial System Redesign
phases.description: Replace the XV-adjacent jewelry grammar with an editorial hacienda wedding language across hero, family, location, gallery, RSVP, and thank-you.

phases.title: Differentiation Audit & QA
phases.description: Validate visual separation from XV, preserve route compatibility, and confirm no regressions to other demos.
